page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.96xlarge is a general-purpose instance belonging to the m8idn family. It is built on the Nitro hypervisor and features dedicated x86_64 Intel processors. The hardware configuration includes 384 virtual CPUs derived from 192 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz.

This instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. For local storage, the m8idn.96xlarge includes bundled NVMe SSD instance store volumes totaling 22,800 GB. It does not feature any graphics processing units.

The instance delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps and is optimized for both network and Elastic Block Store performance. Given its high core count, substantial memory capacity, massive local NVMe storage, and high-speed networking, the m8idn.96xlarge is designed for resource-intensive general-purpose workloads, large-scale databases, and high-throughput data processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.96xlarge is a general-purpose, network and EBS-optimized instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor and dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. The instance features 384 vCPUs running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 1536.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It includes 22,800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. With no integrated GPUs, this instance is designed for high-density, non-accelerated workloads. The combination of high-frequency processing, massive local storage capacity, and high-speed networking makes the m8idn.96xlarge highly suitable for large-scale databases, data-intensive applications, and high-throughput enterprise workloads requiring substantial local storage and network performance.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.96xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 384 vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, 22,800 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 300 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.96xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 384 vCPUs, 1536 GB RAM, 22.8 TB NVMe SSD, and 300 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, massive local NVMe SSD storage, and high-speed 300 Gbps networking.

Equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, offering a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU
